results.requirement_text: The system shall require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials.
warnings: TC_REQ_1_001: The test case adds post‑state behavior ("System proceeds to authenticated session") that is not stated in the requirement. The requirement only mandates that a one‑time code be required after valid login credentials; it does not specify what the system must do after a valid code is entered. Introducing the authenticated session outcome invents additional product behavior.
All generated test cases were rejected by reviewer
results.reason: All generated test cases were rejected by reviewer
